f"; WARNING: Unsupported LHS type in assignment: {type(target).__name__}"
self.emit(f"; WARNING: Unsupported compound assignment operator {operator}")
self.emit("; WARNING: Compound array literal assignment is unsupported")
f"; WARNING: Unsupported LHS type in assignment: {type(target).__name__}"
"Unsupported match arm for SPIR-V codegen; only unguarded "
# Non-identifier callee (e.g., function table call) not supported in SPIR-V path
self.emit("; WARNING: Unsupported callee expression in SPIR-V backend")
"SPIR-V backend does not support CrossGL lambda expressions "
"SPIR-V backend does not support CrossGL lambda expressions "
"SPIR-V backend does not support CrossGL lambda expressions "
assert "Unsupported LHS type in assignment: MemberAccessNode" not in spv_code
with pytest.raises(ValueError, match="Unsupported match arm for SPIR-V"):
"Unsupported match arm for CUDA codegen; only unguarded "
"""Test CUDA makes unsupported shadow sampler calls explicit."""
"float paramValue = /* unsupported CUDA shadow resource call: "

raise ValueError("Unsupported match arm for Rust codegen")

features.name: Native preprocessor handling

features.description: CrossGL vertex entry point lowering.
features.name: Vertex stage

hip.notes: Graphics examples lower to HIP-shaped code, not native raster pipeline stages.

features.name: Stage parameter semantics

features.name: Texture and sampler object model

directx.notes: Covers planar projected texture and shadow compare forms plus non-offset cube color and cube-shadow projection. Cube-array projection and target-invalid offset forms remain deterministic diagnostics.

metal.notes: Covers planar projected texture and shadow compare forms plus non-offset cube color and cube-shadow projection. Cube-array projection and target-invalid offset forms remain deterministic diagnostics.

opengl.notes: Covers planar projected texture and shadow compare forms plus non-offset cube color projection and target-valid cube-shadow projection forms. Cube-array projection and target-invalid LOD/offset forms remain deterministic diagnostics.

features.description: Lower gather, gather-offset, and gather-offsets texture operations.
features.name: Texture gather operations

features.description: Lower shadow sampler compare operations, including offset and LOD variants where target semantics allow them.
features.name: Shadow compare texture operations

features.description: Lower size, LOD, levels, and sample-count resource query operations, with deterministic diagnostics for target-invalid query forms.
features.name: Texture query operations

directx.notes: Covers sampler queries, storage-image size queries, multisample level/sample queries, array/cube-array LOD coordinates, and deterministic diagnostics for target-invalid query forms.

metal.notes: Covers sampler queries, storage-image size queries, multisample level/sample queries, array/cube-array LOD coordinates, and deterministic diagnostics for target-invalid query forms.

opengl.notes: Covers sampler queries, storage-image size queries, multisample level/sample queries, array/cube-array LOD coordinates, and deterministic diagnostics for target-invalid query forms.

features.description: Lower integer-coordinate texel fetch and fetch-offset operations, with deterministic diagnostics for target-invalid fetch forms.
features.name: Texel fetch operations

directx.notes: Covers regular 2D/array fetch and offset lowering plus deterministic diagnostics for storage-image, multisample-offset, and cube/cube-array target-invalid fetch forms.

metal.notes: Covers regular 2D/array fetch and offset lowering plus deterministic diagnostics for storage-image, multisample-offset, and cube/cube-array target-invalid fetch forms.

opengl.notes: Covers regular 2D/array fetch and offset lowering plus deterministic diagnostics for storage-image, multisample-offset, and cube/cube-array target-invalid fetch forms.

status_descriptions.diagnostic: The backend emits a deterministic diagnostic or fallback instead of full target code.
status_descriptions.partial: Implemented for common cases, but known target features or edge cases are missing.
status_descriptions.supported: Implemented with positive tests for the repo-owned CrossGL contract.
status_descriptions.unknown: Not audited yet. Do not treat this as supported.
status_descriptions.unsupported: The backend intentionally does not support this capability yet.
status_descriptions.validated_rejection: The backend rejects this shape with an explicit validation error.
